sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M Polish – The Detail Store
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Polish - 120ml/1L

Rating: 4.8 out of 5 stars (4 Reviews)
100% would recommend this product
Value Rating: 4.3 out of 5

Price: 120ml - $18.99 AUD / 1L - $84.99 AUD (Tax included)

Availability: Sold out (both sizes)

Product Image:
https://www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-polish-120ml.jpg?v=1612496165

Description:
Gyeon Quartz Q²M POLISH is an effective medium polish, designed to leave a hologram-free, deep glossy finish on all paint types. This polish can be used as a single-step for paintwork that only require a little attention or as a second step from Q2M Compound.

Q2M Polish works well on all paint types including the softer Japanese paintwork and will remove any medium imperfections leaving a high gloss finish ready for application of your Gyeon Quartz coating.

Customer Reviews:

Kane P. (Verified Buyer) - 5/5 stars - 7 months ago
"Great Gyeon Products"
I love Gyeon products and this is no exception. Used in a 3 stage paint correction process before ceramic coating. Gives and awesome glossy finish.

Gary W. (Verified Buyer) - 4/5 stars - 9 months ago
"Gyeon polish"
Great polish for removing fine swirl marks would definitely recommend.

Novak D. (Verified Buyer) - 5/5 stars - 1 year ago
"love this"
Tried just about everything else and nothing compares. Wipe off is next level.

Shane P. (Verified Buyer) - 5/5 stars - 4 years ago
"Size Upgrade"
Started off with the small 120ml bottle of Q2M Polish using it on a vehicle along with the Apex DAROP Polishers & German Pads to suit. The entire process from polishing to cleanup was very easy & the results were excellent. I have since upgraded to the Q2M Polish 1L bottle.

Q²M POLISH

Category: Exterior / maintenance

Fine finishing polish for high gloss results.

Q²M Polish is a finishing polish designed to refine paintwork and maximise gloss. It removes light imperfections, haze and micro marring while leaving a clear and high quality finish, making it suitable as a final polishing step.

Product Image:
https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mpolish_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png

An effective polish, designed to leave a hologram free finish and deep gloss.

Q²M Polish focuses on surface refinement rather than heavy defect removal. It improves clarity and gloss while remaining easy to work with, allowing precise control and clean wipe off during the final stages of paint correction.

Key Benefits:
- LOW DUST
- NO SILICONES
- NO FILLERS

TECHNICAL DETAILS
Capacities: 120 ML / 1000 ML
Consumption: 10ML/PANEL

HOW TO USE
1. Apply Q²M Polish to a polishing pad.
2. Work the product using a polishing machine of choice at a moderate speed.
3. Polish until defects are refined and gloss is achieved.
4. Wipe off residue with a clean microfibre towel.
5. Prepare the surface for protection if required.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: What type of defects does Q²M Polish remove?
A: Light imperfections, haze and micro marring.

Q: Is it a one step polish?
A: It is primarily a finishing polish, not a heavy cut product.

Q: Can it be used by hand?
A: It is intended mainly for machine polishing.

Q: Does it leave fillers behind?
A: No, it is designed to leave a clean finish.

Q: Is it suitable before coating?
A: Yes, it prepares paintwork for protection.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Polish - Fast-Acting Finishing Polish — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Polish

Brand: Gyeon

Price: £9.50
Sizes: 120 ml / 1 L
Availability: Out of stock (both sizes)

Product Images:
https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-polish_1240x1068.jpg?v=1630596658
https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-polish-120ml_1119x1119.jpg?v=1630596658
https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-q2m-polish-1l_1119x1119.jpg?v=1630596658

We Say:
There are many excellent ranges of cutting compounds and polishes available on the market these days, so for any new range of polishing products to captivate us they really do have to offer a stand out level of performance. The new line up of Q²M Compound, Q²M Polish and Q² Primer from Gyeon does exactly that. Rather than go down the white-labelling route, Gyeon have instead invested time and effort in developing and manufacturing their own formulas. This approach, while costly, has enabled them to produce a range of polishing products that break new ground. Gyeon Q²M Polish does everything other market leading polishes do, except it cuts faster, generates far less dust (almost none), buffs off more easily, leaves paint feeling smoother and finishes down incredibly well (it's pretty special in this respect). We guarantee you'll love it!

Key Features:
Cut Level: 3/10 (Compared To Others)
Filling Power: 0/10 (Compared To Others)
Gloss Level: 10/10 (Compared To Others)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M Polish is a fast-acting abrasive paste designed to permanently remove minor paint defects such as faint swirl marks, polishing holograms and wash marring from original and refinished paintwork, and produce a perfectly refined high gloss finish ready for the addition of protection. Comprising a unique blend of fine precision-milled Japanese diminishing abrasives suspended in a water-based emulsion, Gyeon Q²M Polish offers significant advantages over rival polishes in terms of extremely low dust production, incomparable finish quality and reduced working time. Free of silicones and fillers, it works best with medium foam polishing pads and performs equally well whether used in conjunction with free-spinning or gear-driven dual action polishers, making it ideal for both home and professional use.

Specification:
- Adds Protection: No
- Chemical Basis: Water-based
- Contains Abrasive Particles: Yes (diminishing)
- Contains Fillers And Glazing Oils: No
- Cut Level: 3
- Gloss Level: 10
- Suitable For Hand Use: No
- Suitable For Hard Paints: Yes
- Suitable For Intermediate Paints: Yes
- Suitable For Machine Use: Yes
- Suitable For Soft Paints: Yes

How To Use:
You should use Gyeon Q²M Polish with a machine. For best results using a dual action polisher, Gyeon Q² Polish should be applied to freshly decontaminated and compounded paint using either a Gyeon Q²M Eccentric Polishing Pad or a Gyeon Q²M Eccentric Finishing Pad. Only 3-4 pea-sized drops of product are required per 18 x 18 area, and these should be worked in thoroughly at 4000-5000 orbits per minute (speed 4-5 on most dual action polishers) until only a hint of oily residue remains. This residue should then be buffed off carefully using a PB Super Buffing Towel.
